title: Ocean Beach San Francisco. A local's guide.
content: # Ocean Beach San Francisco. Ocean Beach in San Francisco is a wide expanse of sand and dunes that faces the Pacific Ocean, stretching for three miles along the entire western edge of San Francisco. Here are some **tips for enjoying your visit to Ocean Beach**: things to do, how to get there, where to park and where to eat. * Things to do at Ocean Beach. * Where to eat near the beach. * Places to stay near Ocean Beach. Come out to Ocean Beach and reconnect with nature; listen to the cries of the seagulls and sounds of crashing surf. Northern end of Ocean Beach San FranciscoOcean Beach, northern end. Sunny days are gorgeous, but Ocean Beach San Francisco is a also great place to walk when the fog is rolling in (which is most of May, June and July, our foggy months in the Avenues). Of all the beaches in San Francisco, Ocean Beach is the most dangerous.
